name: ssot-dry-audit
description: Pure-audit skill: skanuje kod pod katem SSOT/DRY, generuje markdown raport + machine-readable YAML handoff dla /petla solve. Sam NIE naprawia (single responsibility). Polish-business pack: PESEL/NIP/REGON/IBAN/VAT detection, RODO sanityzacja.
author: KFG
notes: v2.0: pivot do pure-audit (Phase 5 cut, refactor delegowany do /petla solve). Slash: /audytssot (legacy /naprawssot usuwany przez install.sh). Output: SSOT_DRY_AUDIT_REPORT.md + .ssot-findings.yaml (oba auto-gitignored). Helper v2.0 z PII redakcja, Polish-business detectors, HTML script extraction, atomic JSON, schema versioning.
